source_text:
(8) 自2019年起，其他市場的年化新保費及新業務價值包括我們於
Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life)所持
49%股權的應佔業績。2018年或以前所呈報的年化新保費及新業
務價值並無重列，並且不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。
自2019年起，本集團新業務價值不包括非控股權益應佔的新業務
價值。2018年或以前的新業務價值並無重列 ，如早前所披露，
並未扣除非控股權益。Tata AIA Life的國際財務報告準則業績乃
採用權益會計法計算。本集團的合併財務報表使用按滯後一個
季度基準的Tata AIA Life財務資料。為明確起見，總加權保費
收入不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。

initial_translation: (8) From 2019 onwards, ANP and VONB for Other Markets include our share of results attributable to our 49 per cent interest in Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life). ANP and VONB reported for 2018 and prior years have not been restated and do not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life. From 2019 onwards, the Group's VONB excludes VONB attributable to non-controlling interests. VONB for 2018 and prior years has not been restated and, as previously disclosed, has not been adjusted for non-controlling interests. Tata AIA Life's International Financial Reporting Standards results are accounted for using the equity method of accounting. The Group's consolidated financial statements use Tata AIA Life financial information on a one quarter lag basis. For clarity, total weighted premium income does not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life.

source_text:
友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的
聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流
行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，
友邦保險的財務實力，以及「幫助大眾活出健康、長久、好生活」的目標，更具重大意義。本人衷心感謝友邦
保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、

initial_translation: AIA has a long and distinguished history in Asia, earning a reputation for managing its business well through periods of social upheaval and uncertainty, demonstrating that AIA is trustworthy, resilient and committed to doing the right thing for its stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has resulted in a constantly changing and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in the political, macroeconomic and capital market landscape. In this context, AIA's financial strength and purpose of helping people live Healthier, Longer, Better Lives has taken on even greater significance. I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude to all of AIA's employees, agents and partners who, even in the face of the most severe challenges, have remained caring towards the community, dedicated to their duties, and focused on serving our customers,

經常性盈利來源。內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元。截至2020年12月31日，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為
374%，足證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。

仍是全球保險業界規模最大的首次公開招股。能夠與董事會成員並肩合作，本人深感榮幸和欣慰。友邦保險的
業務在此期間繼往開來，不斷擴展，成為以市值計全球最大的人壽保險公司。

initial_translation: In the fourth quarter of 2020, we celebrated the 10th anniversary of AIA's listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. Looking back, AIA's listing set multiple records and remains the largest initial public offering in the global insurance industry to date. It has been my privilege and pleasure to work alongside the members of the Board. During this period, AIA's business has continued to grow and expand, becoming the largest life insurance company in the world by market capitalisation.

source_text:
環境、社會及管治議題對全球的影響日形重要。我們當竭盡所能，協助推動社會邁向更美好的未來，而我們的環
境、社會及管治措施在2020年再度備受肯定。根據評級機構Sustainalytics的評選，友邦保險在超過270家保險公
司中排名第二，足證我們卓越的企業管治實力和質素。此外，我們繼續榮獲Institutional Shareholder Services
Inc.(ISS)頒發「Prime」環境、社會及管治企業評級(ESG Corporate Rating)，認同我們為業界可持續發展表現
最佳的公司之一。我們相信我們在這方面仍需採取更多措施，為社區實現更美好的成果。這仍是我個人與董事會

initial_translation: Environmental, Social and Governance issues are becoming increasingly important globally. We are committed to doing everything we can to help drive society towards a better future, and our Environmental, Social and Governance initiatives were once again recognised in 2020. According to ratings agency Sustainalytics, AIA ranked second among more than 270 insurance companies, demonstrating our excellent corporate governance strength and quality. In addition, we continued to receive the 'Prime' ESG Corporate Rating from Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), recognising us as one of the industry's best performers in sustainability. We believe there is still more we need to do in this area to achieve better outcomes for our communities. This remains a personal priority for me and the Board

source_text:
今天，客戶對友邦保險產品、服務及高質素建議日益增長的需求從未如此殷切。我們的策略建基於亞洲強勁的
結構性增長動力，並獲多項因素支持，包括前所未見的財富創造、保障缺口迅速擴大、消費者取向持續轉變、
數碼技術普及，以及市場聚焦於長遠的可持續發展。董事會充滿信心，友邦保險具備優越條件，把握區內展現的
龐大機遇，在客戶及其家庭最需要的時刻提供財務保障，使其安心無憂，並同時為所有持分者創造共享價值。

initial_translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more compelling. Our strategy is built on Asia's strong structural growth drivers and is supported by multiple factors, including unprecedented wealth creation, a rapidly widening protection gap, ongoing shifts in consumer preferences, the proliferation of digital technology, and market focus on long-term sustainable development. The Board is confident that AIA is exceptionally well positioned to capture the significant opportunities across the region, providing financial protection and peace of mind to customers and their families when they need it most, while creating shared value for all stakeholders.
final_translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more compelling. Our strategy is built on Asia's strong structural growth drivers and is supported by multiple factors, including unprecedented wealth creation, a rapidly widening protection gap, ongoing shifts in consumer preferences, the proliferation of digital technology, and market focus on long-term sustainable development. The Board is confident that AIA is exceptionally well positioned to capture the significant opportunities across the region, providing financial protection and peace of mind to customers and their families when they need it most, while creating shared value for all stakeholders.

source_text:
友邦保險是客戶誠可信賴的夥伴，讓客戶在關注財務安全和家庭保障時仍可安心無憂。儘管2019冠狀病毒病大
流行的影響深遠，但我衷心感謝我們的員工、代理和合作夥伴在適應新工作方式並確保為客戶提供無間斷的支援

source_text:
概覽
財務及營運回顧
企業管治
其他資料
財務報表

自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集
團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和
加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險

initial_translation: Since the onset of the pandemic, our business teams across the Group have responded swiftly and proactively to help alleviate the impact on communities while ensuring the safety of our employees. I am proud of the wide range of measures we have implemented, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, free coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and expedited claims payments. True to our commitment to finding every reason to pay, we paid over US$16 billion in insurance benefits and claims during the year, providing vital financial protection to our customers.

source_text:
儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉
趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有
效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則
增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足

The high-quality and recurring income stream generated by our large and growing in-force portfolio drove a 5% increase in OPAT in 2020, while UFSG grew 7% during the period. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, and the Group LCSM cover ratio stood at 374%, demonstrating

平台，並於我們業務所在的大部分市場雄踞領導地位。我們始終如一地百分百專注於亞洲市場，有助我們在全球

initial_translation: Despite 2020 being an unprecedented year, I am more optimistic than ever about the prospects for the Asian life insurance industry and the future of AIA. We continue to challenge ourselves and evolve our priorities to ensure we remain responsive to the changing expectations and financial needs of our customers. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's existing strengths and advances our transformation to best serve our customers in the future.

source_text:
友邦保險中國業務在2020年為本集團新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，並在2021年初表現卓越，與2020年同期比較，
今年首兩個月錄得非常強勁的新業務價值增長。儘管2020年的9.68億美元新業務價值較2019年下降17%，但這主
要由於2019冠狀病毒病在首季爆發初期新銷售有限所致。年內稅後營運溢利增長14%，主要是由於我們日益增長

While VONB of US$968 million in 2020 was 17% lower than in 2019, this was primarily due to limited new sales in the initial stages of the COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. source_text:
在2020年，我們成功獲得監管機搆批復，將上海分公司改建為中國內地首家外資獨資人身保險子公司。於2021年
3月，我們已獲得中國銀行保險監督委員會批復，准予在四川省開業。四川省是中國內地以國內生產總值計的
第六大省份，以人口計為第四大省，為友邦保險帶來重大的長期增長機遇。

group_context_record.group_text:
在2020年，我們成功獲得監管機搆批復，將上海分公司改建為中國內地首家外資獨資人身保險子公司。於2021年
3月，我們已獲得中國銀行保險監督委員會批復，准予在四川省開業。四川省是中國內地以國內生產總值計的
第六大省份，以人口計為第四大省，為友邦保險帶來重大的長期增長機遇。

initial_translation: In 2020, we successfully obtained regulatory approval to convert our Shanghai branch into Mainland China's first wholly foreign-owned life insurance subsidiary. In March 2021, we received approval from the China Banking and Insurance Regulatory Commission to commence operations in Sichuan Province. Sichuan Province is the sixth largest province in Mainland China by GDP and the fourth largest by population, presenting significant long-term growth opportunities for AIA.
final_translation: In 2020, we successfully obtained regulatory approval to convert our Shanghai branch into Mainland China's first wholly foreign-owned life insurance subsidiary. In March 2021, we received approval from the China Banking and Insurance Regulatory Commission to commence operations in Sichuan Province. Sichuan Province is the sixth largest province in Mainland China by GDP and the fourth largest by population, presenting significant long-term growth opportunities for AIA.

source_text:
香港在2020年2月初實施旅遊限制，來自中國內地訪港旅客的新業務銷售實際上已經停頓，導致新業務價值大幅
下降。與上半年比較，我們的代理分銷來自本地客戶的業務於下半年錄得雙位數字的銷售增長，維持顯著的市場
領導地位。夥伴分銷渠道的新業務價值顯著低於2019年，乃由於透過零售獨立財務顧問渠道的中國內地訪港旅客
過往銷售比重較高。稅後營運溢利增長10%，受惠於續保保費強勁的增長及有利的理賠經驗。

initial_translation: Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, and new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors effectively came to a halt, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. Compared to the first half of the year, our agency distribution business from local customers recorded double-digit sales growth in the second half, maintaining a significant market leadership position. VONB from the partnership distribution channel was significantly lower than in 2019, due to the historically higher proportion of sales to Mainland Chinese visitors through the retail independent financial adviser channel. OPAT increased by 10%, benefiting from strong growth in renewal premiums and favourable claims experience.
final_translation: Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, and new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors effectively came to a halt, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. Compared to the first half of the year, our agency distribution business from local customers recorded double-digit sales growth in the second half, maintaining a significant market leadership position. VONB from the partnership distribution channel was significantly lower than in 2019, due to the historically higher proportion of sales to Mainland Chinese visitors through the retail independent financial adviser channel. OPAT increased by 10%, benefiting from strong growth in renewal premiums and favourable claims experience.

source_text:
新加坡業務下半年亦有卓越的好轉，與上半年比較，新業務價值上升56%，按年則上升12%。新業務價值全年
下降5%，由於我們的境外夥伴業務受到嚴格的邊境管制措施所影響，抵銷代理渠道的增長。稅後營運溢利上升
8%。

source_text:
中國內地訪港旅客的旅遊限制影響我們的零售獨立財務顧問業務，導致夥伴業務於2020年的新業務價值下降
41%。我們從銀行保險帶來較為堅韌的業績，並為此渠道的新業務價值帶來大部分的貢獻。我們與印尼的Bank
Central Asia (BCA)、泰國的Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited（盤谷銀行）及馬來西亞的Public Bank
Berhad（大眾銀行）的銀行保險夥伴合作，在2020年均錄得新業務價值正增長。

initial_translation: Travel restrictions on Mainland Chinese visitors impacted our retail independent financial adviser business, resulting in a 41% decline in VONB for the Partnership business in 2020. We delivered more resilient results from bancassurance, which contributed the majority of VONB for this channel. Our bancassurance partnerships with Bank Central Asia (BCA) in Indonesia, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited in Thailand and Public Bank Berhad in Malaysia all recorded positive VONB growth in 2020.

initial_translation: learning culture, providing our employees with a platform to develop meaningful and rewarding careers at AIA. In response to social distancing measures and travel restrictions, we migrated our learning content online to the 'AIA Learning Hub'. The AIA Leadership Centre (ALC), a world-class facility in Bangkok, redesigned and delivered the Group's flagship leadership development programmes with over 100 fully virtualised learning modules. Participants provided very positive feedback on these virtual learning programmes, comparable to the feedback received from previous in-person learning experiences.

source_text:
年度員工敬業度指標調查是我們在各市場共同努力所得成果的重要指標，藉此更瞭解和支援員工。在2020年，
97%的員工參與調查，本集團所得的員工敬業度評分升至歷來新高，在蓋洛普環球金融服務及保險業基準中排名
88分位。此外，友邦保險獲列入《福布斯》
「2020年世界最佳僱主榜單」(‘World’s Best Employers 2020’ list)。

initial_translation: Our annual employee engagement survey is a key indicator of our collective efforts across markets to better understand and support our people. In 2020, 97% of employees participated in the survey, and the Group's employee engagement score rose to an all-time high, ranking at the 88th percentile in the Gallup global financial services and insurance industry benchmark. In addition, AIA was included in Forbes' 'World's Best Employers 2020' list.

These strategic priorities will support our employees' career development and further strengthen AIA's position as an employer of choice.

source_text:
我們從2020年下半年起，透過友邦保險在新加坡和越南的業務作為兩個試點業務單位，展開塑造一個轉型機構的
旅程。初步成果已實現更簡化、更以客為本的營運模式，我們亦推行靈活的工作方式，設立多個跨職能的專家團
隊。我們計劃在這些試點業務內進行試驗和學習，然後將「未來的組織」項目擴展至其他業務。

initial_translation: Since the second half of 2020, we have embarked on a journey to shape a transformational organisation through two pilot business units – AIA's operations in Singapore and Vietnam. Initial results have delivered a more streamlined, customer-centric operating model, and we have also implemented flexible working arrangements and established multiple cross-functional expert teams. We plan to experiment and learn within these pilot businesses before expanding the Organisation of the Future initiative to other operations.

We plan to experiment and learn within these pilot businesses before expanding the Organisation of the Future initiative to other operations.

source_text:
過去一個多世紀以來，友邦保險為亞洲客戶的生活帶來正面和持久的影響。我們的社區存在不少環境、社會及管
治議題，包括氣候變化、環境污染及生活模式相關疾病。隨著疫情大流行持續，突顯了這些問題的複雜性。作為
客戶和社區的終身夥伴，我們竭盡所能，推動社會邁向更美好、更可持續的未來。

initial_translation: For over a century, AIA has made a positive and lasting impact on the lives of our customers across Asia. Our communities face a number of environmental, social and governance issues, including climate change, environmental pollution and lifestyle-related diseases. The ongoing pandemic has highlighted the complexity of these challenges. As a lifelong partner to our customers and communities, we are doing everything we can to drive society towards a better and more sustainable future.

source_text:
友邦保險參與氣候相關財務披露工作小組(Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures)，這個全球組
織致力就氣候變化影響建立一個自願和一致的披露框架。我們繼續重申對有關建議的承諾，在2020年與我們投資
組合內逾1,400家公司，以及超過30名外部投資經理聯繫，致力影響其如何管理氣候變化風險及應對氣候問題。

initial_translation: AIA participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures, a global organisation dedicated to establishing a voluntary and consistent disclosure framework on climate change impacts. We continue to reaffirm our commitment to its recommendations, engaging with over 1,400 companies in our investment portfolio and more than 30 external investment managers in 2020 to influence how they manage climate change risks and address climate issues.
final_translation: AIA participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures, a global organisation dedicated to establishing a voluntary and consistent disclosure framework on climate change impacts. initial_translation: We understand that we still have a long way to go in this important area. We have also recently completed a review of our Environmental, Social and Governance strategy. I am confident that our five strategic focus areas: enhancing physical and mental well-being, green operations, sustainable investment, talent and culture, and effective governance, will help us achieve our ambition to lead the global industry in Environmental, Social and Governance.

source_text:
在2020年，2019冠狀病毒病大流行無疑是我們生活記憶中最大規模的公共衞生緊急狀態。受影響的企業和家庭
獲得前所未見的公共財政和金融支援，有助緩解由疫情大流行造成的部分極端金融衝擊，並加快復甦步伐，這在
具備完善衞生政策及基建的國家尤其可見。然而，各國之間存在顯著差異，在這困境下，亞洲（日本除外）地區
錄得全球相對最強勁的國內生產總值表現。現時，環球經濟正剛剛開始擺脫一場深度衰退，並步入好轉的初步階

initial_translation: In 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic was undoubtedly the largest public health emergency in living memory. Unprecedented public fiscal and financial support provided to affected businesses and households helped mitigate some of the extreme financial shocks caused by the pandemic and accelerated the pace of recovery, particularly in countries with robust health policies and infrastructure. However, significant disparities existed between countries, and under these circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded the relatively strongest GDP performance globally. At present, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from a deep recession and enter the initial stages of recovery.

However, significant disparities existed between countries, and under these circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded the relatively strongest GDP performance globally. At present, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from a deep recession and enter the initial stages of recovery.

source_text:
儘管疫情大流行的影響依然沒有結束，但相信2021年將是過渡性的一年，我們對此保持審慎樂觀。市場憧憬推出
疫苗接種計劃和新療法有助降低疫症的感染率和嚴重性，使醫療系統能更有效應對疫情，並降低死亡率。儘管我
們並不預計外出或消費行為於短期內能回復疫情大流行前的水平，但隨著消費者信心恢復，預期復甦範疇將逐步
由製造主導的產業擴展到消費和服務業。這在人口較年輕的國家將尤其可見。

initial_translation: While the impact of the pandemic is not yet over, we remain cautiously optimistic that 2021 will be a transitional year. Markets are encouraged by the rollout of vaccination programmes and new therapies that are expected to help reduce infection rates and severity, enabling healthcare systems to respond more effectively to the pandemic and lower mortality rates. Although we do not expect travel or consumer behaviour to return to pre-pandemic levels in the near term, as consumer confidence recovers, we expect the scope of recovery to gradually expand from manufacturing-led industries to consumption and services sectors. This will be particularly evident in countries with younger populations.
final_translation: While the impact of the pandemic is not yet over, we remain cautiously optimistic that 2021 will be a transitional year. Markets are encouraged by the rollout of vaccination programmes and new therapies that are expected to help reduce infection rates and severity, enabling healthcare systems to respond more effectively to the pandemic and lower mortality rates. Although we do not expect travel or consumer behaviour to return to pre-pandemic levels in the near term, as consumer confidence recovers, we expect the scope of recovery to gradually expand from manufacturing-led industries to consumption and services sectors. This will be particularly evident in countries with younger populations.

source_text:
我對友邦保險的長遠未來前景充滿信心。儘管面對短期不明朗因素，但帶動需求的本土因素強勁，加上亞洲的主
要人口結構趨勢，仍為友邦保險業務的長遠前景提供正面的結構性支持。在大眾收入增加、私人保險滲透率偏
低，以及社會福利覆蓋有限的情況下，市場對友邦保險產品的需求將繼續增長。我們將憑藉龐大的競爭優勢和強
勁的增長往績，為社區創建更可持續的未來，並為所有持分者創造共享價值。

initial_translation: I am confident about AIA's long-term future prospects. Despite near-term uncertainties, strong domestic demand drivers, combined with Asia's major demographic trends, continue to provide positive structural support for the long-term outlook of AIA's business. With rising household incomes, low private insurance penetration, and limited social welfare coverage, demand for AIA's products will continue to grow. We will leverage our significant competitive advantages and strong growth track record to build a more sustainable future for our communities and create shared value for all stakeholders.
final_translation: I am confident about AIA's long-term future prospects. We will leverage our significant competitive advantages and strong growth track record to build a more sustainable future for our communities and create shared value for all stakeholders.

source_text:
在2020年，友邦保險在全球大流行病帶來的空前商業和宏觀經濟狀況下錄得強勁的財務表現。儘管外出限制導致
2020年新業務價值下降，但隨著業務的調整和限制的有所放寬，我們看到了銷售勢頭的恢復。這種勢頭一直持續
到2021年，首兩個月新業務價值與2020年同期相比增長15%。多年來，我們審慎的財務管理和貫徹對高質素業務
的策略性重點，體現了稅後營運溢利和產生的基本自由盈餘的持續增長、穩健而強韌的資本狀況以及每股股息的

initial_translation: In 2020, AIA delivered strong financial performance amid the unprecedented business and macroeconomic conditions brought about by the global pandemic. Although movement restrictions led to a decline in VONB in 2020, we saw a recovery in sales momentum as the business adapted and restrictions eased. This momentum has continued into 2021, with VONB in the first two months growing 15% compared to the same period in 2020. Our prudent financial management over the years and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business are reflected in the sustained growth of OPAT and UFSG, a robust and resilient capital position, and dividends per share

source_text:
大流行病對我們2020年財務表現的主要影響是對新業務銷售的影響，原因在於我們眾多市場的遏制傳播措施限制
了面對面的銷售活動，尤其是在2020年上半年。儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我
們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集

initial_translation: The primary impact of the pandemic on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures in many of our markets restricted face-to-face sales activities, particularly in the first half of 2020. Although VONB of US$2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread easing of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China made the largest contribution to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding sales to Mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, VONB in the rest of the Group's segments rebounded strongly in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half.

AIA China made the largest contribution to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding sales to Mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, VONB in the rest of the Group's segments rebounded strongly in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half.

團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3
月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁
復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同
期高出15%。

initial_translation: contributed the most to the Group's VONB and was our first reporting segment to show signs of recovering sales momentum as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding sales to Mainland Chinese visitors which remained low, VONB in the rest of the Group's segments rebounded strongly in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum continued to be strong in 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than the same period in 2020.

source_text:
我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，
並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以
上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投
資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此
來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所
改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。

並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以
上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投

initial_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion and maintained a stable operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums received increased by 10%, with total recurring premiums accounting for over 90% of premiums received in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the impact of lower yields on new fixed income investments and the assumed reduction in long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptionally positive health claims experience reported in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see a positive contribution from this source to OPAT growth. Persistency improved in the second half as lapse experience in AIA Thailand normalized, with Group persistency at 95%.
final_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion and maintained a stable operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums received increased by 10%, with total recurring premiums accounting for over 90% of premiums received in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the impact of lower yields on new fixed income investments and the assumed reduction in long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptionally positive health claims experience reported in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see a positive contribution from this source to OPAT growth. Persistency improved in the second half as lapse experience in AIA Thailand normalized, with Group persistency at 95%.

source_text:
產生的基本自由盈餘為58.43億美元，增長了7%，是由我們有效保單組合的持續增長和我們對此積極管理所帶
動，這足以抵銷預期投資回報降低的影響。於2020年12月31日，本集團的財務狀況仍然十分強勁，於派付股息
19.97億美元後，自由盈餘為134.73億美元。

initial_translation: UFSG of US$5.843 billion increased by 7%, driven by the continued growth of our in-force portfolio and our active management of it, which was sufficient to offset the impact of lower expected investment returns. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's financial position remained very strong, with Free Surplus of US$13.473 billion after payment of dividends of US$1.997 billion.
final_translation: UFSG of US$5.843 billion increased by 7%, driven by the continued growth of our in-force portfolio and our active management of it, which was sufficient to offset the impact of lower expected investment returns. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's financial position remained very strong, with Free Surplus of US$13.473 billion after payment of dividends of US$1.997 billion.

initial_translation: As at 31 December 2020, the solvency ratio of our principal operating company, AIA Company Limited (AIA Co.), remained very strong at 489%. As at 31 December 2020, under the new group regulatory framework, the Group LCSM cover ratio was 374%. Going forward, we will disclose the Group LCSM cover ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency.

Going forward, we will disclose the Group LCSM cover ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency.

source_text:
董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的
全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持
續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

initial_translation: The Board has proposed a final dividend of 100.30 Hong Kong cents per share, an increase of 7.5%, subject to shareholders' approval at the Company's forthcoming Annual General Meeting. This brings the total dividend for 2020 to 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, an increase of 6.9% over the total dividend for 2019. This is in line with AIA's long-standing prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which allows the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

This brings the total dividend for 2020 to 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, an increase of 6.9% over the total dividend for 2019. This is in line with AIA's long-standing prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which allows the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

source_text:
儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普
遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個
顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內
地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業
務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同期高出15%。

initial_translation: Although VONB of US$2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and the widespread easing of mobility restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding Mainland Chinese visitor sales in Hong Kong, which remained low, VONB in the rest of the Group rebounded strongly in the second half of the year, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum continued to be strong in 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than the same period in 2020.
final_translation: Although VONB of US$2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and the widespread easing of mobility restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding Mainland Chinese visitor sales in Hong Kong, which remained low, VONB in the rest of the Group rebounded strongly in the second half of the year, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum continued to be strong in 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than the same period in 2020.

source_text:
友邦保險中國業務在2021年錄得成功的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值與2020年同期比較，錄得非常強勁的增
長。2020年新業務價值9.68億美元較2019年減少17%，主要由於2019冠狀病毒病在第一季爆發初期而導致銷售額
有限。隨著外出限制放寬，新業務動力得以迅速改善。新業務價值重拾我們慣常的季節性規律，比重更側重於上
半年。在2020年，友邦保險中國業務為集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻。

initial_translation: AIA China recorded successful momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months showing very strong growth compared to the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the initial outbreak of COVID-19 in the first quarter. As movement restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with greater weighting towards the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB.
final_translation: AIA China recorded successful momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months showing very strong growth compared to the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the initial outbreak of COVID-19 in the first quarter. As movement restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with greater weighting towards the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA China was the largest contributor to the Group's VONB.

source_text:
在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導
致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及
利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回
升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。

initial_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong have been effectively suspended since early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volumes, changes in product mix and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese travelers at the end of September 2020. This supported a recovery in sales to Mainland Chinese visitors to Macau, which accounted for over one-third of total ANP at AIA Macau in the fourth quarter.
final_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong have been effectively suspended since early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volumes, changes in product mix and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese travelers at the end of September 2020. This supported a recovery in sales to Mainland Chinese visitors to Macau, which accounted for over one-third of total ANP at AIA Macau in the fourth quarter.
